ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "present_price" REAL /* Current trading price of the stock */,
  "weekly_rate" INTEGER /* Weekly rate of change for the stock */,
  "weekly_risk_percentage" REAL /* Weekly risk percentage for the stock */,
  "monthly_rate" INTEGER /* Monthly rate of change for the stock */,
  "monthly_risk_percentage" REAL /* Monthly risk percentage for the stock */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum trading price of the stock */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum trading price of the stock */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average trading price of the stock */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "weekly_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock on a weekly basis */,
  "weekly_going_rate" REAL /* Weekly going rate of the stock */,
  "monthly_status" TEXT /* Status of the stock on a monthly basis */,
  "monthly_going_rate" REAL /* Monthly going rate of the stock */,
  "trading_recommendation" TEXT /* Trading recommendation based on the analysis */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, investor, analyst) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* User's risk tolerance level */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* User's investment goal (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* User's investment horizon (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stocks" (
  "user_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-stock relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the stock */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., buy, sell, news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user doing the following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
